channel.title: Podcast on earnest's site
channel.description: Recent content in Podcast on earnest's site

item.title: My Favorite Podcast Apps - Android + Windows
item.description: Jump to: ⭐ Pocket Casts – AntennaPod – Podcast Addict – Grover – Switching Where I listen Mostly on Android – my phone or occasionally tablet, followed by my laptop (Windows 10/ Linux). What’s important to me Trim silent audio, syncing playback/ listening time and history for at least Android and Windows 10. ⭐ Pocket Casts This is the app I’m using now. There are tons of customization/ listening/ player settings.
